title: Robin Searches the Ancient Ruins — Part 6
description: Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.
scene: Across pages 21, this scene centers on Luffy, Wyper, Nico Robin, Zoro, Chopper. Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.
